$description: Insurer-form facsimile palette. The doctor-app review/produce facsimile faithfully reproduces the insurer's printed PAPER form, so these are the paper's own colours (white sheet, print ink, pen ink) — NOT Acuity brand identity. They are deliberately kept OUTSIDE the Caliber brand scale, but defined here as first-class reusable tokens (emitted as --facsimile-* by build-tokens.mjs) rather than ad-hoc hex in an app's CSS. A separate non-brand token layer: the theme reads it alongside the caliber preset; it is not part of the brand snapshot.

paper.$description: The form's paper sheet (pure white, distinct from brand cream).

value.$description: Filled-in field values — the pen's blue ink.

muted.$description: Secondary printed text on the form.

line.$description: Printed rule / underlines on the form.

section.$description: Section-header band fill on the form.
